Package com.bonitasoft.engine.bpm.delegation

Interface DelegationRule

All Superinterfaces:
BaseElement, BaseRestElement, BonitaObject, Serializable
All Known Implementing Classes:
DelegationRuleImpl
public interface DelegationRule extends BaseRestElement
Task delegation rule defined by a user (the delegator) granting another user (the delegate) visibility and execution rights on the delegator's human tasks during a bounded delegation period.

Delegation is not reassignment: tasks remain assigned to the delegator, and the delegate simply gains the ability to see and execute them through dedicated views. Original ownership and full audit trail are preserved via the existing executedBy / executedBySubstitute fields and queryable_log.

A rule applies only to the processes returned by getProcesses() (matched by process name, covering every deployed version). The rule's getStatus() is derived from the date range; there is no boolean activation flag, and deactivation is performed by deleting the rule.

A user can hold at most one delegation rule at a time.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    User
    getDelegate()
    Returns the single user receiving access (the delegate).
    User
    getDelegator()
    Returns the user being delegated (the delegator).
    long
    getEndDate()
    Returns the delegation period end (epoch millis), inclusive.
    long
    getLastUpdatedAt()
    Returns the timestamp of the last modification (epoch millis).
    User
    getLastUpdatedBy()
    Returns the user who last created or modified this rule (self or admin).
    List<String>
    getProcesses()
    Returns the process whitelist for this rule.
    long
    getStartDate()
    Returns the delegation period start (epoch millis), inclusive.
    DelegationStatus
    getStatus()
    Returns the lifecycle status, derived from the date range against the current time.

    Methods inherited from interface org.bonitasoft.engine.bpm.BaseRestElement

    getId

  • Method Details

    • getDelegator

      User getDelegator()
      Returns the user being delegated (the delegator).
      Returns:
      the delegator user

    • getDelegate

      User getDelegate()
      Returns the single user receiving access (the delegate).
      Returns:
      the delegate user

    • getStartDate

      long getStartDate()
      Returns the delegation period start (epoch millis), inclusive.
      Returns:
      the delegation period start as epoch milliseconds

    • getEndDate

      long getEndDate()
      Returns the delegation period end (epoch millis), inclusive.
      Returns:
      the delegation period end as epoch milliseconds

    • getProcesses

      List<String> getProcesses()
      Returns the process whitelist for this rule. Each entry is a process name; selecting a name covers every deployed version of that process. Must contain at least one entry.
      Returns:
      the list of whitelisted process names

    • getStatus

      DelegationStatus getStatus()
      Returns the lifecycle status, derived from the date range against the current time.
      Returns:
      the rule status

    • getLastUpdatedBy

      User getLastUpdatedBy()
      Returns the user who last created or modified this rule (self or admin).
      Returns:
      the last-updater user

    • getLastUpdatedAt

      long getLastUpdatedAt()
      Returns the timestamp of the last modification (epoch millis).
      Returns:
      the last update date as epoch milliseconds
